preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true

column.name: title
column.value: Tuberculosis Laboratory

column.name: objective
column.value: Tuberculosis Laboratory Workflowsa.

column.name: protocol
column.value: Tuberculosis Laboratory

column.name: content
column.value: Tuberculosis Laboratory

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Creation and Full Metadata Capture page for Tuberculosis Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Sample Creation & Full Metadata Capture

column.name: instructions
column.value: Capture complete sample metadata including accession number, specimen information, patient details, clinical context, requested tests, and receipt details.

column.name: content
column.value: Sample Creation & Full Metadata Capture - Complete metadata entry for TB samples

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 1

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 2

changeSet.comment: Create Raw Sample Quality Check (QC) page for Tuberculosis Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Raw Sample Quality Check (QC)

column.name: instructions
column.value: Perform quality checks on raw samples. Verify sample condition, volume, and suitability for processing.

column.name: content
column.value: Raw Sample Quality Check (QC) - Quality assessment of incoming samples

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 2

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 3

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Storage Assignment page for Tuberculosis Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Sample Storage Assignment

column.name: instructions
column.value: Assign samples to appropriate storage locations. Record storage location details and conditions.

column.name: content
column.value: Sample Storage Assignment - Assign samples to storage locations

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 3

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 4

changeSet.comment: Create Initial Sample Processing page for Tuberculosis Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Initial Sample Processing

column.name: instructions
column.value: Perform initial processing steps including sample preparation and decontamination procedures.

column.name: content
column.value: Initial Sample Processing - Sample preparation and decontamination

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 4

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 5

changeSet.comment: Create Incubation & Monitoring page for Tuberculosis Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Incubation & Monitoring

column.name: instructions
column.value: Track weekly culture readings for inoculated samples. Monitor growth patterns over 8 weeks and record final culture results (positive, negative, or contaminated).

column.name: content
column.value: Incubation & Monitoring - Weekly culture reading and growth tracking

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 5

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 6

changeSet.comment: Create Assay/Test Execution page for Tuberculosis Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Assay/Test Execution

column.name: instructions
column.value: Execute requested tests including culture, smear microscopy, GeneXpert, identification, and drug susceptibility testing. Record test results and methods used.

column.name: content
column.value: Assay/Test Execution - Execute and record test results

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 6

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE workflow_category = 'TB'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE id IN (201, 202, 203, 204, 205, 206)

changeSet.comment: Insert predefined TB workflow page templates for dropdown selection

column.name: name
column.value: Sample Creation & Full Metadata Capture

column.name: description
column.value: Capture complete sample metadata for TB specimens

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Capture complete sample metadata including accession number, specimen information, patient details, clinical context, requested tests, and receipt details.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Sample Creation & Full Metadata Capture - Complete metadata entry for TB samples

column.name: name
column.value: Raw Sample Quality Check (QC)

column.name: description
column.value: Quality assessment of incoming TB samples

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Perform quality checks on raw samples. Verify sample condition, volume, and suitability for processing.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Raw Sample Quality Check (QC) - Quality assessment of incoming samples

column.name: name
column.value: Sample Storage Assignment

column.name: description
column.value: Assign TB samples to appropriate storage locations

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Assign samples to appropriate storage locations. Record storage location details and conditions.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Sample Storage Assignment - Assign samples to storage locations

column.name: name
column.value: Initial Sample Processing

column.name: description
column.value: Sample preparation and decontamination for TB processing

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Perform initial processing steps including sample preparation and decontamination procedures.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Initial Sample Processing - Sample preparation and decontamination

column.name: name
column.value: Incubation & Monitoring

column.name: description
column.value: Weekly culture reading and growth monitoring over 8-week incubation period

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Track weekly culture readings for inoculated samples. Monitor growth patterns over 8 weeks and record final culture results (positive, negative, or contaminated).

column.name: default_content
column.value: Incubation & Monitoring - Weekly culture reading and growth tracking

column.name: name
column.value: Sample-Linked Test Execution

column.name: description
column.value: Execute and record TB test results

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Execute requested tests including culture, smear microscopy, GeneXpert, identification, and drug susceptibility testing. Record test results and methods used.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Sample-Linked Test Execution - Execute and record test results

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary WHERE dict_entry = 'Tuberculosis' AND dictionary_category_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'notebook_experiment_type')

changeSet.comment: Add Tuberculosis as an experiment type in the dictionary

column.name: dictionary_category_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'notebook_experiment_type' LIMIT 1)

delete.where: dict_entry = 'Tuberculosis' AND dictionary_category_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'notebook_experiment_type')
